items.title_en: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
items.title_zh: 五角大楼将以色列对美情报活动的威胁提升至最高级别
items.summary_en: The Pentagon reportedly elevated the risk level of Israeli spying on the U.S. to the highest tier, signaling heightened concern within defense and intelligence communities. The move could affect security cooperation and influence internal policies on intelligence-sharing and counter-espionage. It underscores how geopolitical tensions ripple into tech and data security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 据称，五角大楼将以色列对美情报活动的威胁等级提高到最高级别，反映出防务与情报机构的担忧升级。此举可能影响两国在情报共享与安全合作方面的政策走向，并推动相关防范与反情报措施的调整。

items.title_en: S&P 500 rejects SpaceX, also blocking entry for OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 标准普尔500拒绝 SpaceX 入选，也不放行 OpenAI 与 Anthropic
items.summary_en: The piece explains how the S&P 500 committee handles inclusion, and why SpaceX was not added while OpenAI and Anthropic face similarly restrictive considerations. It highlights how profitability, scale, and market categorization influence access to major indices, shaping AI firms’ market visibility.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了标普500 的入选标准与流程，为何 SpaceX 未被纳入、OpenAI 与 Anthropic 面临相似的限制。指出盈利能力、规模与市场分类如何影响进入主要指数，从而影响 AI 公司的市场知名度。

items.title_en: Moving beyond fork() + exec()
items.title_zh: 跳出 fork() 与 exec() 的进程创建方法
items.summary_en: Traditional fork/exec models remain standard but incur significant overhead and security risks. The discussion surveys modern alternatives for spawning processes, such as safer APIs, reduced duplication, and improved sandboxing. For developers, the takeaway is to rethink process creation strategy in runtime design and portability.
items.summary_zh: 传统的 fork/exec 模型仍然常用，但开销大且存在安全风险。文章考察了更现代的进程创建替代方案，如更安全的 API、减少重复创建以及改进沙箱化。开发者应重新评估运行时设计中的进程创建策略与可移植性。

items.title_en: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
items.title_zh: 谷歌每月向 SpaceX 支付 9.2 亿美元用于计算资源
items.summary_en: Google will pay SpaceX around $920 million per month for compute capacity, illustrating a broader strategy to diversify compute resources beyond traditional cloud providers. The arrangement signals intensified competition for AI workloads and potential new compute marketplaces built on unique hardware ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌每月向 SpaceX 支付约9.2亿美元以获得计算资源，显示其在云计算资源来源上寻求多元化。该安排体现对 AI 负载日益增长的需求，以及跨生态合作在未来计算市场中的潜在作用。

items.title_en: Police in England and Wales told to halt AI use in court statements
items.title_zh: 英格兰和威尔士警方被要求停止在法庭陈述中使用 AI
items.summary_en: English and Welsh police were instructed to stop using AI for generating statements in court, citing reliability, bias, and legal risk concerns. The move signals growing scrutiny of AI-assisted evidence and may push agencies to build more auditable, transparent workflows.
items.summary_zh: 英格兰和威尔士警方被要求停止在法庭陈述中使用 AI，原因包括可靠性、偏见与法律风险。此举反映出对 AI 辅助证据的日益严格审查，可能推动更可审计、透明的工作流程。

items.title_en: Zeroserve: A zero-config web server you can script with eBPF
items.title_zh: Zeroserve：一个零配置、可用 eBPF 脚本化的 Web 服务器
items.summary_en: Zeroserve is a zero-config web server you can script with eBPF. It lets you inject custom behavior using eBPF programs, enabling dynamic routing, metrics, and security with low overhead. This approach could lower the barrier to deploying flexible, observable services.
items.summary_zh: Zeroserve 是一个零配置的 Web 服务器，支持通过 eBPF 脚本化自定义行为。借助内核级的可编程能力，它可在边缘进行流量路由、监控和访问控制等定制，而无需繁琐的配置。这样的设计降低了部署动态、可观测服务的门槛，提升灵活性和性能边界。

items.title_en: Python JIT project was asked to pause development
items.title_zh: Python JIT 项目被要求暂停开发
items.summary_en: The Python community steering council asked to pause work on the JIT project, halting a path toward just-in-time compilation for Python. The move reflects governance concerns and balancing stability with performance gains in the language's roadmap.
items.summary_zh: Python 社区治理委员会要求暂停 JIT 项目，暂停了 Python 的即时编译路径。此举反映了在提升性能与维护稳定性之间的治理考量，以及语言路线图的权衡。

items.title_en: Pokemon Emerald Ported to WebAssembly (100k FPS)
items.title_zh: 口袋妖怪绿宝石移植到 WebAssembly，帧率破万
items.summary_en: Porting Pokemon Emerald to WebAssembly demonstrates how WebAssembly can run performance-sensitive emulations in the browser at high frame rates. The project highlights the potential for retro-game experiences with near-native speed and raises questions about licensing, compatibility, and toolchains for WASM-based ports.
items.summary_zh: 将口袋妖怪绿宝石移植到 WebAssembly，表明网页端的高性能仿真有望实现接近原生的运行速度。该项目展示了复古游戏在浏览器中的潜力，同时引发对授权、兼容性与 WASM 移植工具链的讨论。

items.title_en: Nvidia is proposing a beast of a CPU system for Windows PCs
items.title_zh: NVIDIA 为 Windows PC 提出一款强悍的 CPU 系统
items.summary_en: NVIDIA proposes a high-performance CPU system for Windows PCs, signaling a move beyond GPUs into desktop silicon. The concept hints at deep integration with Nvidia accelerators and software stacks, potentially boosting gaming, AI workloads, and content creation while challenging incumbents. If Windows compatibility and driver support align, it could reshape the PC hardware landscape.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达提出面向 Windows PC 的高性能 CPU 系统，标志着其在桌面硬件领域向 GPU 之外扩展的野心。该设想或将深度整合其加速器和软件生态，提升游戏、AI 与创作工作负载的性能，同时对现有厂商形成挑战。如若 Windows 兼容性和驱动生态配套到位，市场格局或将被重新塑造。

items.title_en: Benchmarks in Leipzig
items.title_zh: 莱比锡基准测试
items.summary_en: Leipzig benchmarks gauge performance across relevant systems, revealing progress and remaining gaps.
items.summary_zh: 在莱比锡进行的基准测试评估相关系统的性能，揭示取得的进展与尚需改进的领域。

items.title_en: US House lawmakers release draft bill to prohibit state AI rules
items.title_zh: 美国众议院议员发布草案，禁止州级人工智能规则
items.summary_en: A draft bill proposes preemption of state-level AI rules, steering regulation to federal oversight and limiting local experimentation. The move could slow state-led governance, complicate compliance for vendors, and shift competitive dynamics among AI developers and users.
items.summary_zh: 草案提出对州级 AI 规则的否决权，将监管重心移至联邦层面，限制地方试验。这一举措可能放缓州级治理、增加厂商合规负担，并改变 AI 开发者与使用者之间的竞争格局。

items.title_en: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: Meta 确认数千 Instagram 账号因滥用其 AI 聊天机器人而被入侵
items.summary_en: Thousands of Instagram accounts were compromised as attackers abused an AI chatbot feature, exposing new attack vectors for prompt injection and social engineering. The incident underscores security risks in consumer AI assistants and the need for safer safeguards and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: Meta 确认数千个 Instagram 账号因滥用其 AI 聊天机器人而被入侵，暴露出通过提示注入与社交工程的攻击向量。事件凸显消费级 AI 助手在安全性方面的风险，以及对更安全防护与监控的需求。

items.title_en: The Smart TV in Your LivingRoom Is a Node in the AIScraping Economy
items.title_zh: 你客厅的智能电视正成为 AI 抓取经济中的节点
items.summary_en: A typical smart TV can act as a data-collection node in a broader AI scraping ecosystem, streaming usage data and behavior signals to vendors and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 普通智能电视可能成为更广泛 AI 抓取生态系统中的数据节点，向厂商和研究者传输使用数据与行为信号。文章强调隐私风险、设备潜在攻击面，以及居家智能设备的审计重要性。

items.title_en: You Can Run
items.title_zh: 你可以跑
items.summary_en: A narrative piece about cocaine fugitives and the pursuit to capture them, weaving human stories with law-enforcement dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于涉可卡因走私逃犯及追捕过程的叙事，呈现涉案人物与执法行动的互动。

items.title_en: Gov.uk has replaced Stripe with Dutch provider Adyen
items.title_zh: GOV.UK 已用 Adyen 取代 Stripe 的支付服务
items.summary_en: GOV.UK replaced Stripe with Adyen for payments, indicating a public-sector shift to different payment providers. The change may affect developers integrating with government payments and reflects considerations like cost, reliability, and multi-region coverage.
items.summary_zh: GOV.UK 将支付服务从 Stripe 切换至 Adyen，显示公共部门在支付供应商选择上的调整。对开发者集成政府支付的方式可能有影响，并反映成本、可靠性和区域覆盖等因素的考量。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Why is the HN crowd so anti-AI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：为什么 HN 的人群对 AI 那么反对？
items.summary_en: The discussion surfaces why hackers on HN push back on AI hype—safety concerns, data usage, and misinformation—reflecting a culture wary of unverified breakthroughs.
items.summary_zh: 讨论揭示了 Hacker News 社区对 AI 热潮的抵触原因：安全性、数据使用以及错误信息等担忧，折射出对未经证实突破的谨慎态度。

items.title_en: Running Python code in a sandbox with MicroPython and WASM
items.title_zh: 在沙箱中运行 Python 代码：MicroPython 与 WASM
items.summary_en: Running Python code in a sandbox with MicroPython and WASM offers a portable, secure sandbox for executing Python in constrained environments. This combination can enable embedded tooling or browser-based experiments with safer execution guarantees.
items.summary_zh: 在沙箱中运行 Python 代码，使用 MicroPython 与 WASM 提供了一种便携、隔离的执行环境，便于在嵌入式设备或浏览器中安全地测试和运行 Python。

items.title_en: Changing how we develop Ladybird
items.title_zh: 改变我们开发 Ladybird 的方式
items.summary_en: The post outlines a shift in how the Ladybird project is developed, focusing on new workflows, tooling, and contributor practices to accelerate iteration while maintaining quality. It explains the rationale behind changing development dynamics and what readers might expect in future releases. The change aims to improve collaboration, transparency, and build reliability for users and contributors alike.
items.summary_zh: 该文阐述对 Ladybird 项目开发方式的变革，聚焦新的工作流、工具链和贡献者实践，旨在在保持质量的同时加快迭代速度。文中解释了改变开发动力学的理由，以及未来版本释放中可能出现的变化。此举旨在提升协作、透明度和对用户及贡献者的可靠性。

items.title_en: Zig Zen Update
items.title_zh: Zig Zen 更新
items.summary_en: Zig's Zen update introduces new language features, tooling improvements, and philosophy-driven changes aimed at simpler, safer systems programming. The update highlights Zig's emphasis on practical predictability and cross-compilation friendliness.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的 Zen 更新带来新语言特性、工具改进以及以简化、安全的系统编程为导向的哲学性变更，强调 Zig 对可预测性与跨平台编译友好性的追求。

items.title_en: pg_durable: Microsoft open sources in-database durable execution
items.title_zh: pg_durable：微软开源在数据库内的持久执行
items.summary_en: Microsoft open-sourced pg_durable, a project aiming to provide durable, in-database execution for PostgreSQL. It tackles fault tolerance for long-running analytics and complex workflows by keeping computation results persistent within the database layer.
items.summary_zh: 微软开源 pg_durable，目标是在 PostgreSQL 中实现持久化的数据库内执行。该项目通过在数据库层持久化计算结果，提升长时间分析与复杂工作流的容错性。

items.title_en: New method turns ocean water into drinking water, without waste
items.title_zh: 新方法将海水转化为饮用水且实现零废水排放
items.summary_en: A new desalination method converts ocean water into drinking water with no waste. If scalable, it could dramatically reduce the environmental footprint of desalination and broaden access to freshwater.
items.summary_zh: 一种新型海水淡化方法能够直接生产饮用水且零废水排放。若实现商业化，可能大幅降低淡化过程的环境影响并提升淡水供应。

items.title_en: The new bibliomaniacs
items.title_zh: 新一批书籍狂热者
items.summary_en: An examination of a new wave of bibliophiles and knowledge curators who blend traditional book collecting with digital tools.
items.summary_zh: 探讨以往书籍收藏者的新时代面貌，他们将传统藏书与数字工具结合起来。文章分析人工智能、数据与社交平台如何改变‘书虫’在信息时代的定义与行为。

items.title_en: The intracies of modern camera lens repair (2024)
items.title_zh: 现代相机镜头维修的复杂性（2024）
items.summary_en: It delves into the hidden mechanics of repairing modern camera lenses—from tiny screws and tolerances to coatings and electronic interactions—that complicate field fixes. It also explains why repairability matters for sustainability and cost in 2024's camera ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨现代镜头修复的隐性机制，覆盖小螺丝、公差、涂层以及与传感器的微观交互等，解释这些因素为何让现场维修变得复杂。并指出修复能力对 2024 年相机生态的可持续性与成本的重要性。

items.title_en: Did Claude increase bugs in rsync?
items.title_zh: Claude 是否在 rsync 中引入更多漏洞？
items.summary_en: An analysis questions whether using Claude correlates with more bugs in rsync, raising questions about AI-assisted tooling reliability in critical utilities. It underscores the need for rigorous testing when integrating AI copilots.
items.summary_zh: 分析指出在 rsync 中使用 Claude 可能带来更多漏洞，这凸显了在关键工具中使用 AI 助手时对可靠性和充分测试的关注。

items.title_en: Gemma 4 QAT models: Optimizing compression for mobile and laptop efficiency
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 QAT 模型：为移动端与笔记本优化压缩
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 introduces quantization-aware training (QAT) models that optimize compression for lighter inference on mobile and laptop devices. The approach aims to shrink model size and energy use while preserving accuracy, enabling better on-device AI performance.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 引入量化感知训练（QAT）模型，针对移动端和笔记本实现更高效的压缩，缩减模型体积与能耗，同时尽量保持精度。这将推动在边缘设备上更实用的本地 AI 推理。

items.title_en: Astronauts told to return to ISS after sheltering over air leak repairs
items.title_zh: 宇航员在修复空气泄漏后被指示返回国际空间站
items.summary_en: Astronauts were told to return to the ISS after sheltering during air leak repairs. The move underscores ongoing maintenance risks in space habitats and how teams manage crew safety during contingencies.
items.summary_zh: 宇航员在对空气泄漏进行修复并避难后，被指示返回国际空间站。这一安排凸显太空栖息地的持续维护风险，以及地面团队在应对突发情况时对乘员安全的管理。

items.title_en: Pre-Modern Armies for Worldbuilders, Part I: Why They Fight
items.title_zh: 为世界观创作准备的前现代军队（第一部分）：它们为何战斗
items.summary_en: Part I explains why armies fought in pre-modern times, focusing on logistics, supply lines, morale, and incentives that shaped warfare. It gives worldbuilders practical, historically grounded levers to make fictional forces believable.
items.summary_zh: 第一部分解释了前现代时期军队为何开战，聚焦后勤、供给线、士气和激励因素等如何塑造战争。为世界观创作者提供了历史基础且实用的切入点，让虚构部队更具可信度。

items.title_en: Communities of Not
items.title_zh: Not 的社区
items.summary_en: A thoughtful essay on 'Communities of Not', exploring how groups organize around counter-narratives in tech culture and what that means for collaboration and trust.
items.summary_zh: 《Not 的社区》一文探讨科技文化中以“否定/否认”为共同体核心的社群现象，以及这对协作与信任的影响。

items.title_en: Conventional Commits encourages focus on the wrong things
items.title_zh: Conventional Commits 将关注点放在错误的地方
items.summary_en: A critique argues Conventional Commits focuses on commit message formatting rather than meaningful changes, potentially harming review quality and tooling. It suggests rebalancing emphasis toward semantic commits and broader health signals.
items.summary_zh: 对 Conventional Commits 的批评认为它把注意力放在提交信息格式上，而忽略了变更的语义与代码质量，可能削弱审查和工具链的效果。建议将关注点转向更有意义的变更和项目健康信号。

items.title_en: The back cover of C++: The Language raises questions not answered by front cover
items.title_zh: C++：书籍封底提出的问题，前页未解答
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the back-cover copy of a C++ reference book hints at topics the front cover does not commit to, revealing marketing-technical depth misalignment. It reminds readers that C++'s complexity often leaves questions unanswered even after reading.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章指出 C++ 参考书的背页封底暗示的主题与前页承诺的内容之间存在错位，揭示了营销与技术深度之间的矛盾。文章强调 C++ 的复杂性常在读完书后仍让人感到困惑，问题多于答案。

items.title_en: Introduction – Rust for Python Programmers
items.title_zh: 简介——面向 Python 程序员的 Rust 入门
items.summary_en: An approachable bridge guide for Python developers to learn Rust, covering fundamentals, tooling like Cargo, and practical patterns to boost performance and safety. It helps readers translate Python workflows into Rust-friendly designs and leverage Rust's ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 本教程为 Python 程序员提供友好的 Rust 入门，涵盖基础、工具链（如 Cargo）与提升性能和安全性的实用模式，帮助读者将 Python 工作流迁移到 Rust 风格的设计并利用 Rust 生态。

items.title_en: Three of our worst VC stories
items.title_zh: 我们的三个最糟 VC 故事
items.summary_en: A thread sharing three regrettable VC experiences, illustrating misaligned incentives, bad due diligence, and the harsh realities of startup funding. It offers cautionary lessons for founders.
items.summary_zh: 这条推文讲述了三段关于风险投资的糟糕经历，揭示激励错位、尽调失效等现实问题，并为创始人提供了警示性教训。

items.title_en: Tracing a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe
items.title_zh: 追踪欧洲的强力 GNSS 干扰源
items.summary_en: Researchers trace a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe, characterizing the signal and narrowing down its likely origins. The work has implications for aviation, autonomous navigation, and security, illustrating how signal analysis can localize and mitigate outages.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在欧洲追踪一处强烈的 GNSS 干扰源，对信号特征进行建模并初步定位来源。这项工作对航空、自动导航与安全领域影响深远，展示了通过信号分析定位和缓解中断的可能性。

items.title_en: I tested every IP KVM in my Homelab
items.title_zh: 我在家庭实验室测试了所有 IP KVM
items.summary_en: I tested every IP KVM in my Homelab. A hands-on comparison of IP-based KVM switches for a home lab, evaluating latency, reliability, power, and automation compatibility. The post helps readers pick the right remote management hardware for their setups.
items.summary_zh: 作者在家庭实验室对所有 IP-KVM 进行实际测试，比较延迟、稳定性、功耗与自动化集成等方面的性能，帮助读者为自己的环境选到合适的远程管理硬件。

items.title_en: The perils of UUID primary keys in SQLite
items.title_zh: SQLite 中 UUID 主键的隐患
items.summary_en: The article warns that using UUIDs as primary keys in SQLite can degrade performance due to random access and index fragmentation. It offers guidance to prefer INTEGER keys or optimized strategies to preserve query speed and storage efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 文章警示在 SQLite 中将 UUID 作为主键可能因随机访问与索引碎片化导致性能下降，给出偏好使用 INTEGER 主键或其他优化策略以维持查询速度与存储效率的建议。

items.title_en: Meta Keeps Delaying the Release of Its New AI Model to Developers
items.title_zh: Meta 继续推迟向开发者发布其新 AI 模型
items.summary_en: Meta is extending the timeline for developer access to its new AI model, signaling cautious rollout, risk management, and a strategic cadence in the competitive AI landscape. The delay underscores how access schemes shape ecosystems around large-language-model platforms.
items.summary_zh: Meta 延长新 AI 模型向开发者开放的时间表，显示出更谨慎的推出节奏、风险管理以及在竞争性 AI 生态中的策略性步伐。此举凸显了访问机制如何影响大模型生态。

items.title_en: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
items.title_zh: 从树到流再回到树：统一决策树与扩散模型
items.summary_en: A theoretical piece proposing a unification between decision trees and diffusion models, bringing together interpretable, discrete models with powerful continuous generators. The approach could advance AI interpretability and hybrid architectures.
items.summary_zh: 该研究尝试把可解释的离散模型与强大连续生成模型结合起来，提出统一决策树与扩散模型的方法，或提升可解释性并为混合架构提供新思路。

items.title_en: C++: The Documentary
items.title_zh: C++：纪录片
items.summary_en: The documentary traces the evolution of C++, from its early design goals to modern standards, featuring insights from key figures and code milestones. It situates the language's lasting appeal in its blend of performance, control, and ongoing standards work, explaining why it remains essential for systems programming. The piece also touches on debates about complexity and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 这部纪录片追溯 C++ 的演变，从早期设计目标到现代标准，采访了关键人物并回顾了重要代码里程碑。它将语言的持久魅力归因于性能、控制力与持续的标准化工作，以及为何在系统编程领域仍然不可或缺。文中也触及关于复杂性与生态系统成熟度的讨论。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What was your "oh shit" moment with GenAI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在 GenAI 使用中的‘哦糟了’时刻是什么？
items.summary_en: A community prompt asking for the worst or funniest 'oh shit' moments with GenAI, highlighting surprising failures, hallucinations, and ethical concerns. It gathers practical anecdotes for risk awareness.
items.summary_zh: 社区发起 Ask HN，征集关于在生成式 AI 使用过程中的“哦糟了”时刻，揭示模型幻觉、局限及伦理风险等真实案例。

items.title_en: Azure Linux Desktop
items.title_zh: Azure Linux 桌面：WSLc、WinUI、Reactor 与 Azure Linux 4.0 的融合
items.summary_en: Azure Linux Desktop weaves together Windows-centric tooling (WSLc, WinUI) with Linux desktop capabilities under Azure Linux 4.0 to deliver a cloud-based, GUI-driven Linux experience. The mashup signals how cloud providers are blurring lines between OS ecosystems and easing desktop workflows in the cloud.
items.summary_zh: Azure Linux 桌面将 Windows 生态工具（WSLc、WinUI）与 Linux 桌面能力在 Azure Linux 4.0 下融合，提供云端的图形界面化 Linux 体验。这种混合趋势显示云服务商正在模糊操作系统生态的边界，并简化云端桌面工作流。

items.title_en: India's surprise baby bust
items.title_zh: 印度意外出生率下降
items.summary_en: Economist reports India's birth rate declined unexpectedly, signaling potential shifts in the demographic dividend and implications for labor supply, growth, and global population trends.
items.summary_zh: 经济学人报道印度出生率意外下降，可能改变人口红利格局，对劳动力供给、经济增长及全球人口趋势带来影响。

items.title_en: Lockdown Mode
items.title_zh: 锁定模式
items.summary_en: Lockdown Mode tightens safeguards by restricting certain integrations and limiting data flows. The update signals OpenAI’s emphasis on safety-first configurations for higher-stakes deployments.
items.summary_zh: 锁定模式通过限制某些集成与数据流动来加强安全防护。这一更新体现了 OpenAI 在高风险部署中以安全优先为导向的配置取向。

items.title_en: Transformers are inherently succinct
items.title_zh: Transformers 本质上是简洁的
items.summary_en: A short paper argues transformers can be expressed succinctly, hinting at inherent efficiency in their structure. If validated, this could influence model compression and architectural design for scalable AI.
items.summary_zh: 一篇简短论文声称变压器架构具有本质上的紧凑性，提示其在效率方面的潜力。若得到证实，可能对模型压缩和大模型架构设计产生影响。

items.title_en: How LLMs work
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型如何工作
items.summary_en: A clear primer on how LLMs function, covering tokenization, transformer architectures, training objectives, and scaling laws. It also notes common caveats like the gap between statistical patterns and grounded reasoning that matter for evaluating real-world AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 对大型语言模型如何工作提供清晰入门，涵盖分词、Transformer 架构、训练目标与规模效应，并点出现实世界中需警惕的误区，如统计模式与实际推理之间的差距。

items.title_en: ESP32 Bit Pirate, a Hardware Hacking Tool with WebCLI That Speaks Every Protocol
items.title_zh: ESP32 Bit Pirate：具 WebCLI 的硬件黑客工具，支持多协议
items.summary_en: Introduces ESP32 Bit Pirate, a hardware hacking toolkit with a WebCLI capable of talking multiple protocols. It lowers barriers for hardware testing and security research, while highlighting ethical and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 ESP32 Bit Pirate，一款带有 WebCLI 的硬件黑客工具，支持多种协议。降低了进行硬件测试和安全研究的门槛，同时也强调道德、法律与安全方面的考量。

items.title_en: Entanglement Builds Space-Time. Now "Magic" Gives It Gravity
items.title_zh: 纠缠构建时空，现在‘魔力’赋予引力
items.summary_en: The article explains how quantum entanglement may give rise to spacetime geometry and how new ideas attempt to treat gravity as an emergent phenomenon from quantum correlations. It highlights thought experiments and models linking entanglement, spacetime, and gravity, with implications for quantum gravity research.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释量子纠缠如何可能产生时空几何，以及将引力视为量子相关性涌现效应的新理论思路。介绍了将纠缠、时空与引力联系起来的思路与模型，以及对量子引力研究的潜在影响。

items.title_en: South Korean forums will need to scan every images with AI censorship tools
items.title_zh: 韩国论坛将全面使用 AI 审查工具扫描图片
items.summary_en: South Korea considers mandating AI-based image censorship scans across online forums, raising concerns about privacy, censorship, and platform responsibility. The move could reshape how communities moderate content.
items.summary_zh: 韩国拟要求论坛全面使用 AI 审查工具对图片进行筛查，涉及隐私、内容监管与平台责任等争议。

items.title_en: Azure Linux 4.0 is Microsoft's first general-purpose Linux
items.title_zh: Azure Linux 4.0：微软的首个通用用途 Linux
items.summary_en: Azure Linux 4.0 marks Microsoft's first general-purpose Linux distribution, signaling deeper Linux-cloud integration for Azure. It could influence how enterprises think about OS choices for cloud-native workloads and cross-platform tooling.
items.summary_zh: Azure Linux 4.0 标志着微软首次推出面向广泛用途的 Linux 发行版，旨在支撑 Azure 的云端与边缘工作负载。该举动可能促使企业在云原生场景中的操作系统选择更偏向 Linux，并影响跨平台工具链的发展。

items.title_en: Fine-tuning an LLM to write docs like it's 1995
items.title_zh: 让 LLM 写出1995年的文档：微调
items.summary_en: A look at fine-tuning a large language model to reproduce the tone and conventions of 1990s-era documentation. The approach raises questions about consistency, maintainability, and whether retro-styling aids comprehension for modern readers. The piece weighs benefits against potential outdated practices.
items.summary_zh: 通过对大型语言模型进行微调，使其输出1990年代风格的文档。该方法在提升风格一致性方面有潜在好处，但也可能带来术语落后与维护难题，并对现代读者的理解造成影响，需权衡取舍。

items.title_en: Aging and Eye Problems
items.title_zh: 衰老与眼睛问题
items.summary_en: Aging and Eye Problems discusses how aging affects vision and common conditions that arise with age, alongside practical tips for prevention and care. The piece emphasizes the importance of regular eye exams and adaptive strategies to maintain quality of life as eyes change.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍老化如何影响视力以及随年龄增长常见的眼部疾病，并提供预防与护理的实用建议。强调定期眼检和适应性策略对于维持生活质量的重要性。

items.title_en: AI Can't Care
items.title_zh: AI 不能关心
items.summary_en: A perspective arguing that AI cannot truly care about people, urging designers to acknowledge AI's limitations and design interactions that manage expectations and avoid misattributed empathy.
items.summary_zh: 观点文章认为 AI 无法真正关心人类情感，提醒设计者在交互中明确边界，避免将同情心错误地寄托在机器上。

items.title_en: Lee Kuan Yew's Singapore Story (2023)
items.title_zh: 李光耀与新加坡的故事
items.summary_en: Examines Singapore’s development under Lee Kuan Yew, highlighting governance, economic strategy, and technology policies that helped transform the city-state into a tech-enabled hub. The piece draws lessons for policymakers and tech leaders worldwide.
items.summary_zh: 解读李光耀时期新加坡的发展，聚焦治理、经济策略与科技政策如何将这个城邦转型为以科技驱动的全球枢纽，为全球政策制定者与科技领导者提供借鉴。

items.title_en: First Commodore PET sold, June 5, 1977
items.title_zh: 第一台 Commodore PET 于 1977 年 6 月 5 日售出
items.summary_en: The first Commodore PET went on sale on June 5, 1977, marking a watershed moment in bringing affordable, all-in-one personal computers to homes and small businesses. Its integrated design helped popularize the era of hobbyist computing.
items.summary_zh: 第一台 Commodore PET 于 1977 年 6 月 5 日售出，开启了个人电脑走向大众的时代。PET 将显示屏、键盘等集成在同一设备，推动了家用与小型企业计算的普及。

items.title_en: Mouseless – keyboard-driven control of macOS/Linux/Windows
items.title_zh: Mouseless—通过键盘控制 macOS/Linux/Windows
items.summary_en: Mouseless offers keyboard-driven control across macOS, Linux, and Windows, letting users navigate and operate the OS without a mouse. It targets power users and accessibility advocates seeking faster, distraction-free interactions.
items.summary_zh: Mouseless 提供跨 macOS/Linux/Windows 的全键盘控制，使用户在无需鼠标的情况下进行系统导航与操作，面向追求高效和无干扰体验的用户与无障碍场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Lowfat – pluggable CLI filter that saved 91.8% of my LLM tokens
items.title_zh: Show HN：Lowfat – 可插拔的 CLI 过滤器，节省 91.8% 的 LLM 令牌
items.summary_en: Lowfat is a pluggable CLI filter that dramatically reduces LLM token usage by trimming input before prompting. It helps cut costs and speed up interactions in LLM workflows.
items.summary_zh: Lowfat 是一个可插拔的 CLI 过滤器，通过在提示前对输入进行裁剪，显著降低 LLM 令牌消耗，降低成本并提升响应速度。

items.title_en: The Quiet Numbers Station: Decoding Nineteen Years of GPS Cryptography
items.title_zh: 静默数字广播站：解密 GPS 密码学十九年
items.summary_en: An article on GPS cryptography over 19 years, detailing encryption methods, authenticity signals, and potential weaknesses in civilian vs military signals. It highlights the ongoing evolution of secure navigation signals.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 GPS 密码学十九年来的发展，梳理加密方法、信号认证与潜在弱点，强调导航信号安全性的持续演进。

items.title_en: Mantine-datatable (and others) compromised – owner account suspended
items.title_zh: Mantine-datatable 及其他项目遭到入侵，维护者账户被暂停
items.summary_en: Mantine-datatable and other projects were compromised, with owner accounts suspended. The incident highlights security risks in OSS ecosystems and the downstream impact on users and maintainers.
items.summary_zh: Mantine-datatable 等项目遭到入侵，相关维护者账户被暂停。此事凸显了开源生态的安全风险及对用户和维护者的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Nordstjernen 1.0
items.title_zh: Nordstjernen 1.0 发布
items.summary_en: Nordstjernen 1.0 announces a release with new features and design goals; the post likely highlights improvements, bug fixes, or compatibility updates from the 0.x to 1.0 milestone. It marks a major step for the project.
items.summary_zh: Nordstjernen 1.0 发布，宣布带来新的功能与设计目标，通常会聚焦从早期版本到 1.0 的改进、修复与兼容性提升，标志该项目迈入新阶段。

items.title_en: My Agent Skill for Test-Driven Development
items.title_zh: 用于测试驱动开发的代理技能
items.summary_en: Introduces an agent-centric approach to test-driven development, where automated agents assist with scaffolding tests and driving development cycles. The approach can accelerate workflow but requires discipline to avoid over-reliance.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一种面向代理的测试驱动开发方法，由自动代理协助生成测试和推动开发循环。此思路能提升工作流效率，但也需警惕对 AI 代理的过度依赖。

items.title_en: We have decided to make our service FREE. (Bloomberg Terminal for Everyone)
items.title_zh: 我们决定免费提供服务（面向所有人 的 Bloomberg Terminal）
items.summary_en: Bloomberg will offer its Terminal-like data access for free, funded by ads, signaling a move toward broader, ad-supported access to premium financial information. The shift could democratize market data while reshaping monetization and data quality considerations.
items.summary_zh: Bloomberg 将向大众免费提供类似 Terminal 的数据信息，靠广告支持的新模式可能扩大对高端金融数据的获取范围，同时也引发对数据质量、商业模式的讨论。

items.title_en: Launch HN: General Instinct (YC P26) – Frontier models on edge devices
items.title_zh: Launch HN：General Instinct（YC P26）— 边缘设备上的前沿模型
items.summary_en: Launch HN spotlight on General Instinct, a frontier model designed to run on edge devices. It demonstrates progress toward on-device AI with efficiency focused on latency, memory, and offline capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 在 Launch HN 中介绍 General Instinct，这是一个面向边缘设备的前沿模型。该项目展示了在边缘端实现高效、低延迟、离线可用的 AI 能力的最新进展。

items.title_en: Show HN: ABC Classic 100 Rankings visualised
items.title_zh: Show HN：ABC Classic 100 排名可视化
items.summary_en: The Show HN visualization of ABC Classic 100 rankings provides a compact, interactive view into classical music popularity across time or categories. It demonstrates accessible data visualization at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示的 ABC Classic 100 排名可视化提供关于古典音乐人气随时间或类别变化的紧凑、可交互视图，展示了大规模数据可视化的可访问性。

items.title_en: Tribute to Jiro Yamada, Automotive Artist (1960-2025) [video]
items.title_zh: 致敬汽车艺术家 山田次郎（1960-2025）[视频]
items.summary_en: A video tribute honors Jiro Yamada, whose automotive artwork blended design vision with mechanical craft. The piece showcases his most influential works and the impact on concept cars, automotive branding, and design education.
items.summary_zh: 通过视频致敬山田次郎，他在汽车艺术领域将设计愿景与机械工艺相融合。作品集展现了他最具影响力的作品及其对概念车、品牌与设计教育的影响。

items.title_en: "Maybe later" was a feature
items.title_zh: “稍后再说”其实是一个设计特性
items.summary_en: Argues that deferring actions with a 'Maybe later' option can improve engagement by reducing friction, though some critique says it enables procrastination. It reframes a common UX pattern as a deliberate design choice.
items.summary_zh: 认为“稍后再说”作为一种延迟行为的设计，可能通过降低使用摩擦来提高参与度，但也有观点认为它助长拖延。这把常见的 UX 模式当作有意的设计选择来解读。

items.title_en: Show HN: Formally verified polygon intersection – Opus 4.8 oneshots, prev failed
items.title_zh: Show HN：形式化验证的多边形求交 — Opus 4.8 一次通过，解决先前失败
items.summary_en: Opus 4.8 introduces formally verified polygon intersection, marking a milestone after previous failures. The project demonstrates practical formal verification tooling for computational geometry and improves confidence in geometric algorithms.
items.summary_zh: Opus 4.8 提供了多边形相交问题的形式化验证，通过一次性通过的成就克服了此前的失败。该工作展示了在计算几何领域应用形式化工具的可行性和信心提升。

items.title_en: Redis 8.8: New array data structure, rate limiter, performance improvements
items.title_zh: Redis 8.8：新增数组结构、速率限制器与性能提升
items.summary_en: Redis 8.8 ships with a new array data structure, a built-in rate limiter, and various performance improvements. These changes simplify data modeling, improve traffic control, and boost overall throughput for apps relying on Redis.
items.summary_zh: Redis 8.8 发布，新增数组数据结构、内置速率限制器，以及多项性能改进。这些改动简化数据建模、提升流控能力，并提高对 Redis 依赖的应用的整体吞吐。

items.title_en: Inflation is being driven up by investment in artificial intelligence
items.title_zh: 人工智能投资推高通胀
items.summary_en: Massive AI investment is fueling demand for hardware, software, and talent, contributing to inflationary pressures beyond typical tech sectors. The piece weighs macroeconomic signals, spending patterns, and policy implications for tech companies and consumers.
items.summary_zh: 大规模的人工智能投资推动了对硬件、软件与人才的需求，形成超出传统科技领域的通胀压力。文章评估宏观经济信号、支出模式及对科技公司和消费者的政策含义。

items.title_en: Cooldown Support for Ruby Bundler
items.title_zh: Ruby Bundler 引入冷却机制
items.summary_en: RubyGems adds a cooldown for new gems to undergo vetting before publication. The change aims to improve security and quality in the ecosystem, even if it slows new gem releases.
items.summary_zh: RubyGems 为 Bundler 引入冷却期，对新 gem 进行发表前的审查与验证，提升生态系统的安全性与质量，尽管这可能放慢新 gem 的发布速度。

items.title_en: Inside FAISS: Billion-Scale Similarity Search
items.title_zh: FAISS内幕：亿级相似性搜索
items.summary_en: A look inside FAISS, the billion-scale similarity search library, covering indexing strategies, GPU acceleration, and practical considerations for building scalable vector search systems.
items.summary_zh: 揭示 FAISS 在亿级规模下实现高效相似性搜索的原理，包括索引策略、GPU 加速等要点，并讨论构建可扩展向量检索系统的实际要点。

items.title_en: Social Cache Busting
items.title_zh: 社交缓存失效策略
items.summary_en: Social caches on networks often serve stale previews long after you push updates. The post outlines practical cache-busting techniques for social assets, including versioned URLs, query-string parameters, and targeted CDN invalidations, plus aligning Open Graph data to ensure fresh previews. For developers shipping content updates, proactive cache strategy matters for engagement and trust.
items.summary_zh: 社交平台对内容预览和资源有强缓存，更新后可能长时间显示旧信息。文章给出实际的缓存失效方法，如版本化资源、更改查询参数，以及针对 CDN 的定向失效策略，并强调与 Open Graph 数据对齐以确保新预览生效。对于持续更新的内容，这种缓存策略直接影响用户互动与信任感。

items.title_en: Nine Ways to Do Inheritance in Rust, a Language Without Inheritance
items.title_zh: Rust：在没有继承的语言中实现继承的九种方式
items.summary_en: A Rust-centric guide showing nine patterns to achieve inheritance-like behavior without language-level inheritance, using traits, generics, and composition. It helps Rust developers write flexible, reusable code without classical inheritance.
items.summary_zh: 以 Rust 为核心的指南，展示在没有语言内置继承的情况下，通过 trait、泛型与组合实现继承样式的九种模式，帮助开发者写出更灵活、可复用的代码。

items.title_en: Ten Years of Franz
items.title_zh: Franz 十周年纪念
items.summary_en: Franz spent a decade building a single desktop client that aggregates multiple messaging services. The post reflects on product pivots, community feedback, and lessons learned while outlining the roadmap for the evolving multi-IM ecosystem. It offers takeaways for developers building integrated tools and for users who depend on centralized chat workflows.
items.summary_zh: Franz 作为一个聚合多种对话服务的桌面客户端，走过十年历程，文中回顾了产品演进、社区反馈与关键教训，并展望未来路线。对构建集成型应用的开发者和依赖统一工作流的用户来说，这一里程碑既有技术启示，也揭示了在隐私、稳定性与生态兼容性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Europe's largest Copper Age tomb: children's bones show ancient health crisis
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大的铜器时代墓葬：儿童骨骼揭示古代健康危机
items.summary_en: Archaeologists report Europe's largest Copper Age tomb bears children's bones showing health stress, offering clues about diet, disease, and social structure in that era. It deepens our understanding of ancient health and mortality patterns.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家报道欧洲最大的铜器时代墓葬中儿童骨骼显示健康压力的迹象，揭示当时的饮食、疾病与社会结构等线索，深化了对古代健康与死亡模式的理解。

items.title_en: Building Rust Procedural Macros from the Grounds Up
items.title_zh: 从零开始构建 Rust 的过程宏
items.summary_en: Procedural macros are a powerful Rust feature for meta-programming, letting you generate code at compile time. Building them from scratch introduces patterns for parsing token streams, hygiene, and error reporting, and shows how to implement domain-specific macros like bitfield helpers. This practical guide helps Rust developers unlock deeper code generation capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 过程宏是 Rust 的强大元编程特性，能在编译时生成代码。从头实现它们能学习解析标记流、词法作用域等设计模式，并演示如何实现领域特定的宏，如位域助手。这份实用指南有助于开发者掌握更深层的代码生成能力。

items.title_en: No Let, No Rec, No Problem: A Gentler Introduction to the Y and Z Combinators
items.title_zh: 不需要 let、也不用递归：更友好的 Y 与 Z 组合子入门
items.summary_en: Y and Z fixed-point combinators let you express recursion without named functions. A gentler introduction walks through intuition and practical examples, showing how to implement recursive behavior in languages without native recursion or let-bindings. The takeaway is a clearer mental model of fixed-point theory and how to simulate self-reference in simple terms.
items.summary_zh: Y 与 Z 固定点组合子让你在没有显式递归的情况下实现自引用。本文用更易懂的讲解和示例，演示在没有 let 绑定或显式递归的语言中如何实现递归行为，帮助读者建立对固定点原理的直观理解。

items.title_en: Show HN: Infinite canvas notes in the non-Euclidean Poincaré disk
items.title_zh: Show HN：在非欧几里得庞加莱圆盘上的无限画布笔记
items.summary_en: Show HN presents an infinite canvas notes app built on the non-Euclidean Poincaré disk. It explores how hyperbolic geometry can influence information density and note-taking UX.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一款在非欧几里得庞加莱圆盘上实现的无限画布笔记应用，探索双向缩放和信息密度在超曲率空间中的应用。通过将几何学引入用户界面，展示了新型笔记工具的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Soft Body Jiggle Physics
items.title_zh: Show HN：软体物理抖动效果
items.summary_en: This project offers a compact implementation of soft-body jiggle physics suitable for games and simulations, emphasizing approachable code, real-time performance, and extensibility. It’s a useful reference for hobbyists and developers exploring physics-based animation without heavy engines.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供了一个简洁的软体物理抖动实现，适用于游戏与仿真，强调可读性、实时性能与扩展性。对于爱好者和开发者探索无重型引擎的物理动画非常有参考价值。

items.title_en: Splash Is a Colour Format
items.title_zh: Splash 是一种颜色格式
items.summary_en: Splash is a new color format that promises to optimize color representation for faster rendering and more efficient compression. If adopted by graphics pipelines and hardware, it could streamline image processing and real-time rendering.
items.summary_zh: Splash 是一种新颜色格式，致力于优化颜色表示、提升渲染效率或压缩性能。若被图形管线和硬件广泛采纳，可能影响图片处理与实时渲染的实现。

items.title_en: Summer of '85: DOSBOS is rejected by ANALOG Computing
items.title_zh: 1985 年夏季：DOSBOS 被 ANALOG Computing 拒绝
items.summary_en: A retro-tech vignette about a DOS-based project called DOSBOS being rejected by ANALOG Computing in the Summer of 1985, highlighting the era's gatekeeping and editorial preferences.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性文章讲述 DOSBOS 项目在 1985 年夏天被 ANALOG Computing 拒绝的事件，反映了早期计算机出版物的门槛与编辑偏好。

items.title_en: HISE – Toolkit for building VST plugins
items.title_zh: HISE：构建 VST 插件的工具包
items.summary_en: HISE provides an open-source, end-to-end toolkit for building VST plugins, covering synthesis, sampling, and a visual GUI designer. It lowers the barrier to audio plugin development and accelerates prototyping for independent developers and small studios.
items.summary_zh: HISE 提供开源的 VST 插件开发全链工具包，涵盖合成、取样和可视化 GUI 设计器，降低插件开发门槛并加速独立开发者和小型工作室的原型设计。

items.title_en: Raytracing Geometries in 3D Rendering
items.title_zh: 3D 渲染中的光线追踪几何体
items.summary_en: A look at how geometry representations—meshes, bounding volumes, and acceleration structures—drive efficient ray tracing in 3D rendering. The piece blends theory with practical picks for implementing fast ray tracing pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 探讨网格、包围体与加速结构等几何表示在高效光线追踪中的作用，结合理论与实际实现要点，帮助读者构建更快的光线追踪管线。

items.title_en: WoofWare.PawPrint, a Deterministic .NET Runtime
items.title_zh: WoofWare.PawPrint：一个确定性的 .NET 运行时
items.summary_en: WoofWare.PawPrint is a deterministic .NET runtime aimed at reproducible results and safer concurrent execution. It appeals to developers needing predictable builds for testing, formal verification, or embedded contexts.
items.summary_zh: WoofWare.PawPrint 是一个确定性的 .NET 运行时，旨在实现可重复的执行结果，降低时序与并发带来的不确定性。对需要可预测构建、形式化验证或嵌入式场景的开发者具有吸引力。

items.title_en: Mathematician solves origami donut efficiency challenge with fewest folds
items.title_zh: 数学家用最少折叠次数解决折叠甜甜圈效率难题
items.summary_en: A mathematician claims the donut folding problem can be solved with the fewest folds to maximize efficiency, offering insights into combinatorial origami and potential manufacturing optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 一位数学家声称通过最少折叠次数即可解决甜甜圈折叠效率问题，为组合折纸学提供新见解，并可能带来制造优化的启示。

items.title_en: We shrank our TimescaleDB chunks from 30 days to 7
items.title_zh: TimescaleDB 数据分区从 30 天缩短至 7 天
items.summary_en: Smaller chunk intervals can dramatically improve time-series queries, ingestion performance, and maintenance in TimescaleDB. The team reduced chunk duration from 30 days to 7, citing faster pruning, better compression, and more flexible TTL-based data management, while noting trade-offs like more chunks. This illustrates how tuning chunk size can materially affect operational efficiency for time-series workloads.
items.summary_zh: 将 TimescaleDB 的数据分区时间范围从 30 天缩短到 7 天，显著提升了查询与写入性能以及维护效率。通过更小的分区，团队获得了更快的分区剔除、改进的压缩效果，以及更灵活的 TTL 数据管理，同时也要权衡分区数量增加带来的管理复杂度。
